MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THE SWEDISH SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ROGER STEINER AND ERNST JENSEN'S PETITION FOR DECREE TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. Appearances: Robert H. Peterson, III of the Law Offices of Peterson & Peterson (586.7460) for petitioner and moving party. No other appearances.
